# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent linkerd authz missing.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: service-a-server
  namespace: service-a-namespace
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: service-a
  port:
    number: 8080
  proxyProtocol: "HTTP/1.1"

---

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: service-a-to-service-b-authz
  namespace: service-a-namespace
spec:
  server:
    name: service-a-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: service-b
          namespace: service-b-namespace

---

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: service-b-server
  namespace: service-b-namespace
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: service-b
  port:
    number: 9090
  proxyProtocol: "HTTP/1.1"

---

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: service-b-to-service-a-authz
  namespace: service-b-namespace
spec:
  server:
    name: service-b-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: service-a
          namespace: service-a-namespace

---

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: service-b-to-service-c-authz
  namespace: service-b-namespace
spec:
  server:
    name: service-b-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: service-c
          namespace: service-c-namespace

---

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: service-c-server
  namespace: service-c-namespace
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: service-c
  port:
    number: 7070
  proxyProtocol: "HTTP/1.1"

---

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: service-c-to-service-b-authz
  namespace: service-c-namespace
spec:
  server:
    name: service-c-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: service-b
          namespace: service-b-namespace
